name: ultraindex
description: Deterministically scan a whole repo (code + docs), build a typed link-graph between files, and emit a layered, navigable encyclopedia so an AI can work in huge codebases without filling its context window. A skills.sh agent skill (generator + light navigator).

scripts.check:build: tsup && node scripts/copy-bundle.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- scripts/ultraindex.mjs skills/ultraindex/scripts/ultraindex.mjs skills/ultraindex-nav/scripts/ultraindex.mjs
scripts.demo: node scripts/ultraindex.mjs build --repo tests/fixtures/mini-repo --out /tmp/ultraindex-demo && node scripts/ultraindex.mjs check --repo tests/fixtures/mini-repo --out /tmp/ultraindex-demo

author: maxgfr
